subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved daughter! Thy letter was received and was perused in the utmost joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه تو رسید و بکمال سرور قرائت گردید که الحمد لله در ژاپان نور محبه الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @bringing forth results; fruit
